property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: test_processOrderWithErrors
testcase.system-out: 16:12:49.653 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Request validated for customer=CUST001 16:12:49.675 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD001 16:12:49.675 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD002 16:12:49.675 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD003 16:12:49.676 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD004 16:12:49.795 [parallel-2] WARN com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Skipping productId=PROD001 due to error: Simulated repository error for: PROD001 16:12:49.796 [parallel-2] WARN com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Skipping productId=PROD003 due to error: Simulated repository error for: PROD003 16:12:49.901 [parallel-4] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Product available with stock: PROD002 16:12:49.902 [parallel-4] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Discount applied for product=PROD002, finalPrice=45.00 16:12:49.937 [parallel-4] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order completed orderId=077ab9a5-cdfc-47de-bb69-de05edef6a59, productCount=1 16:12:49.988 [parallel-4] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order pipeline finished with signal=onComplete

testcase.name: test_processOrderSuccess
testcase.system-out: 16:12:49.996 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Request validated for customer=CUST001 16:12:49.996 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD001 16:12:49.996 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD002 16:12:50.212 [parallel-9] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Product available with stock: PROD002 16:12:50.212 [parallel-8] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Product available with stock: PROD001 16:12:50.212 [parallel-9] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Discount applied for product=PROD002, finalPrice=45.00 16:12:50.212 [parallel-9] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Discount applied for product=PROD001, finalPrice=1080.00 16:12:50.213 [parallel-9] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order completed orderId=3774cba9-7f54-4902-8d04-cfc34dc6fb16, productCount=2 16:12:50.217 [parallel-9] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order pipeline finished with signal=onComplete

testcase.name: test_processOrderWithDiscounts
testcase.system-out: 16:12:50.220 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Request validated for customer=CUST001 16:12:50.220 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD001 16:12:50.220 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD003 16:12:50.430 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Product available with stock: PROD001 16:12:50.430 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Discount applied for product=PROD001, finalPrice=1080.00 16:12:50.430 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Product available with stock: PROD003 16:12:50.430 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Discount applied for product=PROD003, finalPrice=11.40 16:12:50.430 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order completed orderId=1fdec909-3a47-4acf-9297-5c9e5ba41ee4, productCount=2 16:12:50.433 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order pipeline finished with signal=onComplete

testcase.name: test_processOrderWithInvalidIds
testcase.system-out: 16:12:50.435 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Request validated for customer=CUST001 16:12:50.436 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD001 16:12:50.436 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=UNKNOWN 16:12:50.436 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD003 16:12:50.540 [parallel-4] WARN com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Skipping productId=UNKNOWN due to error: Product not found: UNKNOWN 16:12:50.649 [parallel-6] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Product available with stock: PROD001 16:12:50.649 [parallel-6] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Discount applied for product=PROD001, finalPrice=1080.00 16:12:50.649 [parallel-6] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Product available with stock: PROD003 16:12:50.649 [parallel-6] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Discount applied for product=PROD003, finalPrice=11.40 16:12:50.649 [parallel-6] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order completed orderId=5daa734f-81fe-448f-836f-b592f2031a83, productCount=2 16:12:50.650 [parallel-6] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order pipeline finished with signal=onComplete

testcase.name: test_processOrderTimeout
testcase.system-out: 16:12:50.652 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Request validated for customer=CUST001 16:12:50.652 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD001 16:12:55.658 [parallel-7] ERROR com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order processing error java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException: Did not observe any item or terminal signal within 5000ms in 'peek' (and no fallback has been configured) at reactor.core.publisher.FluxTimeout$TimeoutMainSubscriber.handleTimeout(FluxTimeout.java:296) at reactor.core.publisher.FluxTimeout$TimeoutMainSubscriber.doTimeout(FluxTimeout.java:281) at reactor.core.publisher.FluxTimeout$TimeoutTimeoutSubscriber.onNext(FluxTimeout.java:420) at reactor.core.publisher.FluxOnErrorReturn$ReturnSubscriber.onNext(FluxOnErrorReturn.java:162) at reactor.core.publisher.MonoDelay$MonoDelayRunnable.propagateDelay(MonoDelay.java:270) at reactor.core.publisher.MonoDelay$MonoDelayRunnable.run(MonoDelay.java:285) at reactor.core.scheduler.SchedulerTask.call(SchedulerTask.java:68) at reactor.core.scheduler.SchedulerTask.call(SchedulerTask.java:28) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor$ScheduledFutureTask.run(ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor.java:304) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) 16:12:55.661 [parallel-7] ERROR com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Creating FAILED order due to: Did not observe any item or terminal signal within 5000ms in 'peek' (and no fallback has been configured) 16:12:55.661 [parallel-7] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order pipeline finished with signal=onComplete

testcase.name: test_processOrderWithoutStock
testcase.system-out: 16:12:55.663 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Request validated for customer=CUST001 16:12:55.664 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD004 16:12:55.664 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD005 16:12:55.664 [main] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Processing productId=PROD003 16:12:55.875 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Product available with stock: PROD003 16:12:55.875 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Discount applied for product=PROD003, finalPrice=11.40 16:12:55.875 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order completed orderId=63caabdd-5cf1-4d71-92a8-114cf65f19f1, productCount=1 16:12:55.875 [parallel-1] INFO com.ynov.reactivepipeline.service.OrderService -- Order pipeline finished with signal=onComplete
